# ORWOOD

> ORWOOD is a global interior fit-out atelier — design, build, joinery and FF&E delivered as one accountable team. Founded in 2004 and headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey, with owned manufacturing facilities producing furniture, joinery, materials and fire-rated door systems in-house.

ORWOOD serves hospitality groups, hotel owners, developers, commercial property owners, architects, interior designers and luxury residential clients across the GCC, Turkiye and UK/Europe. All enquiries are project-based; there is no e-commerce or published pricing.

## Services

- [Design & Build](https://orwood.com/services): One accountable team from first sketch to final handover — concept, technical detail, and on-site delivery under a single roof.
- [FF&E Procurement](https://orwood.com/services): Furniture, fixtures and equipment — specified, sourced and installed to the millimetre of the design intent.
- [Furniture Solutions](https://orwood.com/services): Contract-grade furniture, manufactured in owned workshops to survive the wear of public, commercial and hospitality life.
- [Joinery & Manufacturing](https://orwood.com/services): Bespoke joinery — panelling, reception desks and fitted detail — machined and hand-finished in-house.
- [Fire Rated Doors](https://orwood.com/services): Proprietary ORWOOD Doors system — acoustic and fire-rated door sets engineered, manufactured and certified as a complete assembly.
- [Interior Fit-Out](https://orwood.com/services): Complete interior construction — partitions, ceilings, flooring and M&E, coordinated and delivered as one managed scope.
- [Value Engineering](https://orwood.com/services): Cost-conscious design development that protects the intent — finding the right detail at the right price before it reaches the workshop.
- [Project Management](https://orwood.com/services): Programme, cost and quality held by one accountable team from mobilisation to handover.

## Industries

- [Hospitality](https://orwood.com/industries/hospitality): Hotels, resorts, restaurants and spas — public areas and guestrooms built to perform under constant use.
- [Commercial](https://orwood.com/industries/commercial): Workplaces, lobbies and showrooms delivered as turnkey fit-outs.
- [Residential](https://orwood.com/industries/residential): Private homes and branded residences with furniture-grade joinery and bespoke FF&E.
- [Retail](https://orwood.com/industries/retail): Stores and showrooms manufactured and rolled out to an exact, repeatable specification.
- [F&B](https://orwood.com/industries/food-beverage): Restaurants, cafes and bars where atmosphere and durability meet.
- [Mixed-use](https://orwood.com/industries/mixed-use): Large developments with hospitality, retail, workplace and residential interiors held to one standard.

## Manufacturing Group

ORWOOD owns three dedicated manufacturing operations in Istanbul:

- **Hi Mobilya**: Bespoke and contract furniture production — machinery, upholstery and finishing at series scale.
- **SILADU**: Surface, veneer and material development — the palette behind every ORWOOD interior.
- **ORWOOD Doors**: Proprietary acoustic and fire-rated door systems, engineered and tested as complete assemblies to BS EN 1634-1 and BS EN ISO 10140.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2004
- Headquarters: Istanbul, Turkey (Ikitelli OSB, Basaksehir)
- Projects delivered: 200+
- Experience: 20+ years
- Regions served: GCC (Qatar, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman), Turkiye, UK & Europe
- Certifications: ISO 9001:2015 (Quality Management), ISO 14001:2015 (Environmental Management)
- Fire ratings: FD30 and FD60 door sets (30- and 60-minute integrity)
- Acoustic ratings: Rw 32-38 dB sound reduction

## Process

ORWOOD follows a seven-step delivery process: Discovery, Design Development, Engineering, Manufacturing, Procurement, Installation, Handover. Design, engineering and manufacture happen in the same building, so a detail drawn by the design studio is costed by engineers, prototyped in workshops, and finished by in-house teams before it ships.

## Selected Projects

- [The Aram Hotel](https://orwood.com/projects/aram-hotel): 220-key waterfront hotel in Doha — Design & Build, FF&E, Joinery, Fire Rated Doors.
- [Lumen Offices](https://orwood.com/projects/lumen-offices): 9,600 sqm grade-A workplace in Dubai — Turnkey Interiors, Interior Fit-Out, FF&E, Project Management.
- [Maren Residence](https://orwood.com/projects/maren-residence): 640 sqm private residence in Istanbul — Joinery, FF&E, Furniture Solutions.
- [Solis Resort & Spa](https://orwood.com/projects/solis-resort): 140-key coastal resort in Bodrum — Design & Build, Interior Fit-Out, Joinery, FF&E.
- [Northbank HQ](https://orwood.com/projects/northbank-hq): 12,000 sqm corporate headquarters in Riyadh — Furniture Solutions, FF&E, Value Engineering.
- [Cedar House](https://orwood.com/projects/cedar-house): Five-storey London townhouse — Joinery, Fire Rated Doors, Furniture Solutions.
